title: Install Thinking Partner Skill with Multi-App Symlinks
summary: Install mattnowdev/thinking-partner skill into OpenCode after Skill Writer validation and create symlinks for Codex and .agents access
keyOutcomes: Skill Writer validation completed — all checks pass
Junctions created for Codex and .agents (symlinks fell back to junctions due Windows permissions)
150+ mental models available for thinking sessions
Anti-Gravity has no native skills dir; .agents/skills junction provides shared agent surface
risks: Symlink creation requires Windows Developer Mode or elevated permissions — junctions used as fallback
OpenCode may require a new session/restart before skill appears in available_skills
Upstream skill may change — commit ce95b628 pinned in plan
validationCriteria: Skill Writer validation: PASS (all frontmatter, naming, description, reference checks pass)
SKILL.md exists with correct frontmatter: PASS
Reference files exist in references/ subdirectory: PASS
Anti-Gravity native skills location checked: PASS (no skills dir found)
